heading: Expanded access to mainstream financial institutions
label: 5623 Expanded access to mainstream financial institutions

(b)(1), was in the original “this title”, meaning title XII of , , , known as the Improving Access to Mainstream Financial Institutions Act of 2010, which is classified principally to this subchapter. children.text: to enable low- and moderate-income individuals to establish one or more accounts in a federally insured depository institution that are appropriate to meet the financial needs of such individuals; and
to improve access to the provision of accounts, on reasonable terms, for low- and moderate-income individuals.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall restrict participation in any program established under subsection (a) to an eligible entity. Subject to regulations prescribed by the Secretary under this subchapter, 1 or more eligible entities may participate in 1 or several programs established under subsection (a).

children.label: B
children.text: financial education and counseling relating to conducting transactions in and managing accounts.
